faq.question: What solutions does Beyond Horizon Technologies provide?
faq.answer: Beyond Horizon Technologies provides intelligent asset management solutions including UAV systems, robotics, LiDAR, 3D mapping, remote inspection technologies and digital asset intelligence solutions.

faq.question: What industries can benefit from your solutions?
faq.answer: Our technologies support industries such as construction, infrastructure, oil and gas, education, research and other sectors requiring efficient asset monitoring and data collection.

faq.question: What is intelligent asset management?
faq.answer: Intelligent asset management combines advanced technologies, data collection and analytics to help organisations monitor, maintain and make better decisions about their physical assets.

faq.question: Do you provide customised solutions?
faq.answer: Yes. We work with clients to understand their requirements and recommend suitable technology solutions based on their operational challenges and objectives.

faq.question: What types of inspection technologies do you offer?
faq.answer: We provide remote inspection solutions using UAV, robotics and specialised systems designed to improve inspection safety, efficiency and data accuracy.

faq.question: Do you provide UAV and drone solutions?
faq.answer: Yes. Our UAV solutions support applications such as aerial inspection, monitoring, mapping and data collection for various industries.

faq.question: What is LiDAR and 3D mapping used for?
faq.answer: LiDAR and 3D mapping technologies are used to capture accurate spatial data, create digital models and support analysis, documentation and planning activities.

faq.question: Can your solutions integrate with existing workflows?
faq.answer: Yes. Our solutions can be adapted to support existing operational workflows, reporting requirements and digital asset management processes.

faq.question: Do you provide product documentation?
faq.answer: Yes. Product brochures, datasheets, manuals and technical resources are available through our support section.

faq.question: How can I request a consultation?
faq.answer: You can contact our team through the contact page. We will discuss your requirements and recommend the most suitable technology solution.
